news.title:
JSW Cement faces Rs 688.8 cr ITC disallowance, equal penalty by Haldia CGST.
Company plans to appeal, expects no material financial impact currently.
news.summary:
JSW Cement faces Rs 688.8 cr ITC disallowance, equal penalty by Haldia CGST.
Company plans to appeal, expects no material financial impact currently.

news.title:
JSW Cement Ltd forms a subsidiary, JSW Cement Middleeast LLC, in Fujairah, UAE.
The subsidiary is established with a cash subscription of AED 100,000 to expand overseas.
news.summary:
JSW Cement Ltd forms a subsidiary, JSW Cement Middleeast LLC, in Fujairah, UAE.
The subsidiary is established with a cash subscription of AED 100,000 to expand overseas.

news.title:
JSW Cement has commissioned a greenfield cement plant in Nagaur, Rajasthan.
The plant adds 2.5 MTPA grinding and 3.3 MTPA clinkerisation capacity, raising total grinding capacity to 24.1 MTPA.
news.summary:
JSW Cement has commissioned a greenfield cement plant in Nagaur, Rajasthan.
The plant adds 2.5 MTPA grinding and 3.3 MTPA clinkerisation capacity, raising total grinding capacity to 24.1 MTPA.

news.title:
JSW Cement named preferred bidder for Sikilangso Limestone Block mining lease.
This move strengthens JSW Cement's resource base and production capabilities.
news.summary:
JSW Cement named preferred bidder for Sikilangso Limestone Block mining lease.
This move strengthens JSW Cement's resource base and production capabilities.

news.title: EVERBEST CONSULTANCY SERVICES bought 7.3M shares of JSW Cement at ₹127.2 avg price.
news.summary: EVERBEST CONSULTANCY SERVICES bought 7.3M shares of JSW Cement at ₹127.2 avg price.

news.title:
JSW Cement's presentation highlights 21.6 MTPA grinding, 6.44 MTPA clinker capacity.
Focus on GGBS business, market share, growth strategy, financials, and sustainability.
news.summary:
JSW Cement's presentation highlights 21.6 MTPA grinding, 6.44 MTPA clinker capacity.
Focus on GGBS business, market share, growth strategy, financials, and sustainability.

news.title:
JSW Cement shared its Q3 FY26 Investor Presentation highlighting a 13.2% YoY revenue growth to Rs 1,621 crore and 31.5% YoY EBITDA rise to Rs 285.1 crore.
Q3 FY26 saw 14% YoY sales volume growth, driven by 17% increase in GGBS sales. CRISIL upgraded JSW Cement's long-term credit rating to AA (Stable).
news.summary:
JSW Cement shared its Q3 FY26 Investor Presentation highlighting a 13.2% YoY revenue growth to Rs 1,621 crore and 31.5% YoY EBITDA rise to Rs 285.1 crore.
Q3 FY26 saw 14% YoY sales volume growth, driven by 17% increase in GGBS sales. CRISIL upgraded JSW Cement's long-term credit rating to AA (Stable).

news.title: Shares worth ₹8,600 crore from JSW Cement and others to unlock this week.
news.summary: Shares worth ₹8,600 crore from JSW Cement and others to unlock this week.

news.title:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.
news.summary:
Cement majors like Shree Cement, UltraTech, and Ambuja posted double-digit volume growth in Q3.
Firms expect demand and price recovery, aided by low inflation, tax reforms, and infrastructure growth.

news.title:
JSW Cement hosted a Results Conference Call on 5th Feb 2026 to discuss Q3 FY26 financial results.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website for reference.
news.summary:
JSW Cement hosted a Results Conference Call on 5th Feb 2026 to discuss Q3 FY26 financial results.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website for reference.

news.title:
JSW Cement projects mid to high teens volume growth next year.
North region volumes are anticipated to exceed this growth projection.
news.summary:
JSW Cement projects mid to high teens volume growth next year.
North region volumes are anticipated to exceed this growth projection.

news.title:
JSW Cement reports improved demand and prices in January vs earlier months.
Management expects positive momentum in demand and pricing to continue into Q4.
news.summary:
JSW Cement reports improved demand and prices in January vs earlier months.
Management expects positive momentum in demand and pricing to continue into Q4.

news.title:
JSW Cement Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹2.85B from ₹1.5B YoY, showing strong growth.
EBITDA margin improves to 17.6% from 10.3% YoY, reflecting better efficiency.
news.summary:
JSW Cement Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹2.85B from ₹1.5B YoY, showing strong growth.
EBITDA margin improves to 17.6% from 10.3% YoY, reflecting better efficiency.

news.title:
JSW Cement approved Q3 FY26 results, reappointed MD and Independent Director.
Proposed 1.65 MTPA UAE grinding unit with $39M capex, $29.3M loan guarantee.
news.summary:
JSW Cement approved Q3 FY26 results, reappointed MD and Independent Director.
Proposed 1.65 MTPA UAE grinding unit with $39M capex, $29.3M loan guarantee.

news.title:
JSW Cement completes securities transfer, transferring 100 securities of Algebra to Nuvoco Vistas.
Algebra owns Gujarat power plants in Kutch and Surat; sellers include JSW Cement, Alpha Alternatives.
news.summary:
JSW Cement completes securities transfer, transferring 100 securities of Algebra to Nuvoco Vistas.
Algebra owns Gujarat power plants in Kutch and Surat; sellers include JSW Cement, Alpha Alternatives.

news.title:
JSW Cement to hold Board meeting on 4th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan to 6th Feb 2026 for designated persons.
news.summary:
JSW Cement to hold Board meeting on 4th Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY26 results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan to 6th Feb 2026 for designated persons.

news.title:
JM Financial downgraded JK Cement and Birla Corp citing balanced risk-reward, market share concerns.
Intense competition from larger cement players may impact profitability in the medium term.
news.summary:
JM Financial downgraded JK Cement and Birla Corp citing balanced risk-reward, market share concerns.
Intense competition from larger cement players may impact profitability in the medium term.

news.title:
Equirus initiates coverage on JSW Cement with a 'long' rating and Rs.167 target.
JSW Cement benefits from GGBS market dominance, synergies with JSW Steel, and infrastructure demand.
news.summary:
Equirus initiates coverage on JSW Cement with a 'long' rating and Rs.167 target.
JSW Cement benefits from GGBS market dominance, synergies with JSW Steel, and infrastructure demand.

news.title:
JSW Cement to invest ₹11,000 crore in 3 years to double capacity to 41 mt.
Current production capacity is 20 mt, same as at the time of IPO.
news.summary:
JSW Cement to invest ₹11,000 crore in 3 years to double capacity to 41 mt.
Current production capacity is 20 mt, same as at the time of IPO.

news.title:
JSW Cement Q1 FY26 results discussed in earnings call by JM Financial.
Call covered revenue growth, profitability, metrics, and future outlook.
news.summary:
